title: What's available to her is available to me
subtitle: A release-and-allow statement for releasing the belief that financial success belongs to other people.
excerpt: A short energy statement for releasing the exclusion belief around money and allowing yourself into the same availability. Use when you see other people succeeding financially and your first response is that it's not for you.
sourceNotes: Adapted from Day 16 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025). The release-and-allow structure draws on The Money Zone (Rebecca Page, 2024).

content.text: A short energy statement for releasing the belief that financial abundance is available to some people and not to you. The release names the exclusion; the allow names equal access.
I am ready to release the belief that financial success is available to others but not to me. I release it now. I release it now. I release it now.
I am ready to align with and allow the same financial opportunities, flow, and abundance that are available to everyone. I allow it now. I allow it now. I allow it now.
Say each three times, slow, out loud or in your mind.
Adapted from Day 16 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025). The release-and-allow structure draws on The Money Zone (Rebecca Page, 2024).
